commands.review_summary:
The PR reorders direct `runReplyAgent` pre-run maintenance so `runMemoryFlushIfNeeded` runs before `runPreflightCompactionIfNeeded`, and updates direct-runtime coverage for the new order.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +5. Total +5 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main and `v2026.6.11` run preflight compaction before memory flush, and the later flush gate can skip once compaction lowers token pressure. I did not run a live long-context Telegram/provider reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor-side real behavior proof and intentional session-state compatibility acceptance, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: Run memory flush before preflight compaction
target.body:
Fixes #84695.

## Summary

- Run automatic memory flush before preflight compaction in `runReplyAgent`.
- Keep visible memory-flush errors on the same pre-run return path before the main reply.
- Add regression coverage proving memory flush is invoked before preflight compaction.

## What Problem This Solves

`runReplyAgent` must run the memory-flush phase before preflight compaction so durable memory has a chance to run before aggressive transcript reduction. Before this PR, preflight compaction could run first and reduce transcript context before the automatic memory flush path had a chance to preserve it.

## Evidence

- Real environment tested: isolated worktree `/private/tmp/openclaw-pr84792-proof-rebase-20260630`, rebased onto current `origin/main` `d68ba5edc59`, PR head `8c816b184195db99570e124e649f39f8b0e8e237`, Node `v24.18.0`.
- Exact proof command:

```sh
OPENCLAW_DIAGNOSTICS=1 \
OPENCLAW_DIAGNOSTICS_TIMELINE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-84792-rebased-timeline.jsonl \
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts -- \
  -t 'resolves direct reply runs before early helpers read config'
```

- Parsed diagnostics proof:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "head": "8c816b184195db99570e124e649f39f8b0e8e237",
  "timelinePath": "/tmp/openclaw-84792-rebased-timeline.jsonl",
  "phaseStartOrder": [
    "reply.memory_flush",
    "reply.preflight_compaction"
  ],
  "relevantEvents": [
    {
      "type": "span.start",
      "name": "reply.memory_flush",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-07-01T05:08:39.377Z",
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "span.end",
      "name": "reply.memory_flush",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-07-01T05:08:39.378Z",
      "durationMs": 0.613
    },
    {
      "type": "span.start",
      "name": "reply.preflight_compaction",
      "phase": "agent-turn",
      "timestamp": "2026-07-01T05:08:39.378Z",
      "attributes": {
        "provider": "openai",
        "hasSessionKey": true,
        "isHeartbeat": false,
        "queueMode": "interrupt",
        "isActive": false,
        "blockStreamingEnabled": false
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

Observed result after fix: the diagnostics timeline for the rebased PR head starts `reply.memory_flush` before `reply.preflight_compaction`, proving the pre-run maintenance order is flush first, then compaction.

What was not tested: no external provider turn was executed; the proof intentionally stops at the preflight compaction sentinel after exercising the real `runReplyAgent` pre-run maintenance path.

## Verification

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-memory.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-state.test.ts
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  92 passed (92)

node node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-direct-runtime-config.test.ts
All matched files use the correct format.

pnpm check:test-types
# passed

pnpm lint
# passed

git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
# clean
```
